title: Resolve Chat Interpretation Split-Brain Architecture
description:
The codebase has two parallel chat interpretation paths with different semantics: LlmChatInterpreter early-returns on deterministic fast paths, while ChatInterpreter still creates CreateGoal interpretations directly for build/gather/craft/navigate routes. This conflicts with the Sprint 35 architecture contract: parsers never create goals.

Source: msa_sprint35-llm-first_audit_2026-06-24.md (P0 Finding 2, 99% confidence)

Requirements:
1. Keep only stop/status/inventory/help as deterministic shortcuts
2. Route everything else through semantic intent (IntentDraft)
3. Move goal creation exclusively into the planner/intent manager layer
4. Remove or retire the old ChatInterpreter direct-goal-creation path

Files: Agent.Planning/LlmChatInterpreter.cs, Agent.Planning/ChatInterpreter.cs

Related: TSK-0107 (runtime decomposition — both involve architectural migration)

comments.author: SteveBot
comments.body: Converted from orphan .md file (TSK-0118.md) to canonical .json format as part of task store cleanup council 2026-06-27.
